svg.text: ▸ Pick page w/ most eligible lines
UNIQUE(line_id, user_id) — one row per (line, user)
Edit = UPSERT in-place, count never re-incremented
Fully idempotent — re-run same import = no side effects
Alembic manages schema · Pillow/numpy reserved for future steps
Surya fields preserved: bbox · polygon · line_index · confidence
Image files → storage · image_path stored on pages row
transcriptor · yanirmr · 2026 · FastAPI · PostgreSQL · SQLAlchemy · Alembic · Google OIDC · Surya OCR
